# 🖥️ Interactive CLI Questionnaire

Introduce a command‑line interface that guides the user through a series of choices when generating documents or performing other tasks.

- Prompt for company name, role, availability, etc.
- Offer numbered lists for selecting which paragraphs or activities to include.
- Allow multiple selections (e.g. choose up to four extracurricular entries).

The CLI would make it easier for non‑technical users to create well‑formed output without editing files manually.

----- COMMENTS -----
Could be the entry point for the templated document generator described above.
